title: cortex.factory.workflow.*
description: Published for each stage in a factory workflow. Subject pattern: cortex.factory.workflow.<slug>.<stage>

account_ref.description: OpenClaw account to send message through.

target.description: OpenClaw target (channel ID, user ID, thread key).

thread_key.description: Stable thread identifier for grouping messages.

approval_id.description: Present when this stage requires approval before advancing.

blocks.description: Pre-built canonical rich-block envelope. If absent, consumer builds a default.
